$comment_managedBy: Free-form label shown to end-users under 'Managed by:'. Pick something they recognise — your company name, MDM tool, etc.
$comment_preset: One of: 'personal' (everything on), 'work-standard' (no sync), 'work-strict' (no sync, no AI, no export). Acts as the base; the optional 'features' block overrides individual flags.
$comment_features: Granular overrides. Anything you omit inherits from the preset. Anything you include wins over the preset.
